visual_description: A man with dark hair, wearing a black shirt, is shown in a medium close-up. He is positioned behind a metal grate, looking over his shoulder toward the camera with a serious and intense expression. The lighting is dim and moody, casting shadows on his face. The background is a dark, out-of-focus interior. In the top left corner, there is a watermark with Chinese characters. The camera remains static, holding the focus on the man's concerned gaze. The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful instrumental track. A rhythmic, percussive beat creates a driving, urgent pace, while a low, ominous string melody weaves through, building a sense of anticipation and unease. The overall mood is one of high-stakes drama and impending action. The scene cuts to a very dark, almost black shot. The man from the previous shot is no longer visible. The frame is almost entirely black, with only faint, indistinct shapes suggesting a dimly lit, cluttered space. The same Chinese character watermark is still visible in the top left corner. The camera is static, creating a sense of mystery and suspense. The shot changes to a slightly wider view of a dimly lit room. A shelf with a few white bowls is visible
